text:
LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: CMS Participating Provider Pioneer ACO RIF 

VALUES: N = non-primary care specialist 
 Y = primary care specialist 

COMMENT: The primary care specialist flag is not set for Performance Year 1 (PY1) providers. The primary care 
specialist flag is used solely to apply rules governing whether a provider may be listed as a 
participating provider by more than one Pioneer ACO.
